pre_registered_predictions.P1_order_positive: PASS: stress gamma=0 has AB order signal, BA order signal remains zero, and release differs.
pre_registered_predictions.P2_gamma1_null: PASS: gamma=1 rows have zero order signal and zero terrain/release difference.
pre_registered_predictions.P3_context_specificity: PASS: normal/storage rows have zero order signal and zero terrain/release difference.
pre_registered_predictions.P4_replay_specificity: PASS: matched replay reproduces downstream release once the AB order-signal trace is fixed.

safe_interpretation: With fixed noncommuting context probes and no direct outcome write beyond the conservative order signal, AB and BA read order diverge only in stress gamma=0. AB produces a conservative order signal, higher final terrain, and higher downstream release; BA remains at baseline. Gamma=1 and normal/storage are null. Matched replay reproduces downstream release once the order-signal trace is fixed, so specificity is at the context-order measurement boundary.
limitations: Context axes are fixed after preselection, but not derived from hardware calibration.
The order signal is a model-level sequential-measurement score.
Post-order terrain/release dynamics are classical-effective once the order-signal trace is fixed.
Does not prove consciousness or observer causation.
